column1: There is a piano ____ the wall. (рядом с)
There is a French book _____ the shelf. (на)
There is a big balcony ___ his flat. (в)
There is an armchair ____ the balcony door. (рядом с)
There is a big table ____ the room. (в)
There is a little cup of coffee on the table ____ the living room. (в)
There is a beautiful picture ____ the sofa. (позади)
There is a book ____ the sofa and the armchair. (между)
